summary: Tested Tech Analysis overlay functionality - encountered navigation and access issues to the specific research view with overlay controls

ui_bugs.issue: Unable to access the specific research view with overlay controls (Fib, Pattern, Setup, TA buttons)
Could not locate overlay toggle buttons with data-testids: fibonacci-toggle-btn, pattern-toggle-btn, setup-toggle-btn, ta-toggle-btn

integration_issues.issue: Navigation to Tech Analysis leads to prediction view instead of research view with overlay controls

passed_tests: Chart rendering is working - can see candlestick data
Some TA elements are visible on chart (support/resistance levels, colored zones)

success_percentage.frontend: 25% - Basic navigation works but overlay controls not accessible

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation to Tech Analysis research view. The current Tech Analysis link leads to a prediction view instead of the research view that should contain overlay controls (Fib, Pattern, Setup, TA buttons). Need to ensure the research view component with data-testid='research-view' and sub-chart-controls with overlay toggle buttons are accessible.
